name: Minneapolis Pickleball Club
description:
Pay to play facility, with multiple membership options:  One includes two hours of rental per month ($75) another includes two open plays per month ($35).  Either membership type allows renting courts or registering for Open Plays.  Open play and court rental rates vary by time of day. Reservations and Open Play are done via CourtReserve.

In addition, guests can be registered by members as well.  Members have a security card for access to allow for themselves and their guests.

Multiple leagues are available including 2.75-3.5, 3.5-4.25, and 4+.

Has indoor heated parking for members, free outdoor for their guests.

There are instructors who teach there.  They have Ernie machines available for use as well.
